cases.prompt: 하이브리드 앱 좋을까 아니면 네이티브? 앱 플랫폼 선택 도와줘.

assertions.text: Walks the decision matrix/tree across PWA, Hybrid, Cross-platform, and Native on dev speed, performance, store approval, and solo-dev fit.
Produces a clear platform decision with pros-cons rather than listing options without a recommendation.
Recommends a concrete tech stack (React Native/Expo, Flutter, Capacitor) matched to the situation.

cases.prompt: Can I build a PWA and still get it approved on the App Store, or will it get rejected as a web wrapper?

assertions.text: Explains Apple 4.2 Minimum Functionality rejection and a web-wrapper approval strategy (native features, offline mode, deep interaction).
Warns against guaranteed-reject patterns like a single WKWebView that only loads a URL.
Gives a store approval strategy for web-wrapped apps as part of the output.
